title: VoiceTTA: Enhancing Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech via Reinforcement Learning-Based Test-Time Adaptation
abstract: arXiv:2606.26534v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Recently, zero-shot text-to-speech (TTS) has enabled high-fidelity and expressive speech synthesis, but it often fails to imitate unseen speaking styles from uncommon scenarios (e.g., crosstalk, dialects). Moreover, fine-tuning pretrained models requires large, high-quality datasets, limiting rapid personalization. We propose VoiceTTA, a reinforcement learning-based test-time adaptation (TTA) method that improves voice imitation of pretrained zero-shot TTS models. VoiceTTA introduces two style rewards based on coefficient-of-variation differences of F0 and energy, combined with speaker similarity and intelligibility (WER from a pretrained Whisper model), and optimizes learnable prefixes via group relative preference optimization (GRPO) in a flow matching-based model at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial improvements on uncommon speech prompts, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Audio samples are availa

translated_title: VoiceTTA：通过基于强化学习的测试时自适应增强零样本文本转语音
translated_abstract: 最近，零样本文本转语音（TTS）技术实现了高保真度和富有表现力的语音合成，但在模仿来自不常见场景（如相声、方言）的未见说话风格时往往失败。此外，微调预训练模型需要大规模高质量数据集，限制了快速个性化。我们提出了VoiceTTA，一种基于强化学习的测试时自适应（TTA）方法，用于改进预训练零样本TTS模型的语音模仿。VoiceTTA引入了两种基于F0和能量变异系数差异的风格奖励，结合说话人相似性和可懂度（来自预训练Whisper模型的WER），并在推理时通过组相对偏好优化（GRPO）优化基于流匹配模型中的可学习前缀。大量实验表明，该方法在不常见语音提示上取得了显著改进，超越了当前最先进的基线模型。音频样本已提供。
tldr: 提出一种基于强化学习的测试时自适应方法VoiceTTA，通过结合风格奖励和可学习前缀优化，显著提升零样本TTS在不常见语音场景下的模仿能力。
en_tdlr: VoiceTTA proposes a reinforcement learning-based test-time adaptation method that combines style rewards and learnable prefix optimization to significantly enhance voice imitation in zero-shot TTS for uncommon speech scenarios.
